{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Reader's sense
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] can use a [[Reader's sense]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
